contents_tesim: Book of the teachings of the men of Homs
Commentary of St. Ephrem on Genesis (the Testament of our father Adam to his son Seth)
It begins, "If you want to learn when the Christians fast and hold festival and the days in which the Jews hold festival..."
Sermon for the Rite of Marriage
The story of our father Adam
